property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance 1. Stops a physical attack. Search your opponent's life deck for all copies of that card and discard them. For each card discarded this way, gain 2 power stages.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. Raise your anger 1 level. If you declared tokui-waza, you may choose to have this attack deal no damage. If you do, raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +5 power stages of damage. Lower your opponent's anger 1 level. For the remainder of combat, while your MP's power rating is not 0, it is considered to be +1,000,000 for each anger your opponent's MP is below 5. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. Costs 1 power stage to perform. Search your life deck or discard pile for a Non-Combat card that can perform or copy an attack and place it into play. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 3 life cards of damage. Costs 1 power stage to perform. This attack does +1 life cards of damage for each energy attack you've performed this combat. You may remove a copy of Namekian Piccolo's Hellzone Grenade in your discard pile from the game to have this card stay on the table to be used 1 more time this combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: Resist. Whenever your card effect puts 1 or more cards back into your life deck, raise your anger 1 level. Your first Namekian style attack each combat does +X life cards of damage where X is your current anger level. This card is not discarded when you advance a personality level.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: Resist. Raise your MP to its highest power stage. You may place any number of cards from your hand on the bottom of your life deck, then draw that many cards. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. Costs 1 power stage to perform. For the remainder of combat, your Orange style energy attacks gain "raise your anger 1 level." Empower 2. For the remainder of combat, your Orange style energy attacks gain "If successful, raise your anger 1 level." You cannot win by MPPV.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: You may lower your MP 1 personality level. If you do, for the remainder of combat, your attacks deal +2 life cards of damage, then, at the end of combat, raise your MP 1 personality level.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: Resist. Once per combat, if you have 2 or more anger, you may lower your anger to 0 to stop a physical or energy attack.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: Resist. Stops a physical or energy attack. For the remainder of combat, prevent 2 power stages of damage and 2 life cards of damage from your opponent's attacks. If you declared tokui-waza, you may remove 3 Saiyan style cards in your discard pile from the game to shuffle this card into your life deck after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: Resist. Your Saiyan style cards that can stop attacks or prevent damage can stop and prevent damage from Focused attacks. When you stop an attack or prevent damage with a Saiyan style card, gain 2 power stages and the next Saiyan style attack you perform does +2 life cards of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attacks cost -2 power stages to perform.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: Search your life deck for a card that can attach to a card in play, and place it into play attached. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical or energy attack. Gain 3 power stages. You may remove a named card matching your main personality in your discard pile from the game to shuffle this into your life deck. This card is considered a named card matching your main personality for deck construction and gameplay.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: (If King Kai is your MP, Gregory gains Resist.) Constant Combat Power: Gregory does not need to be in control of combat to use this power: Your personality powers that perform attacks are focused.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: (If this card is in your MP stack, your deck may include personalities of any level. For the remainder of the game, you may play allies one level higher than your MP.) Power: If Dende is your MP. search your life deck for an ally and place it into play at its highest power stage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: (If Jeice is your MP, you may also use your level 1 personality power.) Constant Combat Power: Each time your opponent stops one of your energy attacks, discard the top 2 cards of their life deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Your cards that can search for Drills can also search for Styled Non-Combat/Non-Drills. Your cards that prevent damage can prevent damage from Focused Attacks.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Rogue

property.name: Text
property.value: (Any may play Tori-Bot as an ally.) Power: Draw a card, then discard a card. Tori-Bot may use this power regardless of your MP's power rating.
